author: orchestrator
builder_claim: DuckDB data pipeline — Postgres-to-DuckDB export mechanism with persistent database file, corrected analytical views, and idempotent pipeline guard

required_proof.description: Demonstrate that the DuckDB data pipeline exports Postgres session/part data into a persistent DuckDB file, creating working analytical views, with idempotency and graceful error handling

implemented_capabilities: DuckDBConfig service reading OPENCODE_DUCKDB_PATH env var
DuckDB.layer reads dbPath from config instead of hardcoded :memory:
Data pipeline exports session and part data from Postgres to DuckDB via subprocess
Corrected analytical views matching Postgres schema (session table, part table, jsonb extraction)
initViewsSql() called during pipeline initialization with semicolons between statements
Idempotent pipeline via _pipeline_meta PRIMARY KEY guard with schema_version
Non-blocking pipeline via Effect.forkIn(scope) with AbortSignal support
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE for crash recovery
CAST(... AS text) for cross-dialect (Postgres + SQLite) compatibility
capabilities_explicitly_not_implemented: Integration tests with real duckdb binary (CI-gated)
Periodic data refresh / incremental sync (deferred to P1)
strongest_suspected_weakness: Pipeline runs in background fiber with no user-visible status indicator. If it fails silently, the user never gets analytical data and has no way to diagnose.

round_1.result: 4 blocking defects — views, layer crash, config module, false claim

round_2.result: 1 blocking defect — unixepoch() SQLite function in DuckDB SQL
